research_sources: VS Code layout patterns (sidebar, activity bar, status bar)
Linear UI redesign (reduced visual noise, hierarchy, density)
Docker Desktop design system (status cards, service list)
improvements_implemented: A) HEADER: Compact 40px height, single-line layout, subtle separator
B) SERVICE TABLE: Improved alternating rows, hover states, column widths
C) ACTION PANEL: Section dividers, grouped actions (primary/tools), better spacing
D) THEME: Consistent 6px border-radius, 8px grid system, subtle focus rings

changes_summary.theme.py: Complete redesign with consistent 6px radius, 8px grid, subtle hover states, improved scrollbars
changes_summary.main_window.py: Compact 40px header, cleaner layout, better event indicator styling
changes_summary.service_table.py: Improved row spacing, better alternating colors, cleaner project counts
changes_summary.action_panel.py: Added section dividers, grouped actions into primary/tools sections, better spacing

verification: All files compile successfully with py_compile
